name: Middle-aged obesity urolithin A registry is completed with no posted results
summary: NCT05921266 is a completed urolithin A registry with vascular and mitochondrial biomarker endpoints, but no posted results are available.
statement: ClinicalTrials.gov lists NCT05921266 as a completed 50-participant urolithin A trial in middle-aged adults with obesity, with arterial, cerebral blood-flow, nitric-oxide, and mitochondrial-function biomarker endpoints and no posted results in the June 10, 2026 API view.
population_or_model: Adults aged 40 to 64 years with obesity
quantitative_note: Actual enrollment is 50; registry status is completed; result status is not posted.
caveats: No-results registry status is not efficacy evidence.
The population and endpoints are metabolic and vascular rather than direct healthy-aging function.
The absence of posted results limits confidence until registry results or a linked publication appears.
